entity.label: Eliakim
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Melea (Luke 3:30), and probably grandson of Nathan.

nodes.label: Eliakim
nodes.description: The son of Melea (Luke 3:30), and probably grandson of Nathan.

nodes.label: Melea
nodes.description: Fulness, the son of Menan and father of Eliakim, in the genealogy of our Lord (Luke 3:31).

verses.text: Which was the son of Simeon, which was the son of Juda, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Jonan, which was the son of Eliakim,
